description_long: This is a vintage-style metal lantern with a cylindrical glass enclosure at its center, surrounded by a robust, weathered metal frame. The lantern features a domed top with a small handle for carrying or hanging, and two vertical side supports that connect the top and bottom. The glass enclosure is protected by a crisscrossed metal wire guard, which adds both structural integrity and a rustic aesthetic. The surface of the lantern is dark, with visible patches of rust and wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor use. The base is wide and stable, designed to rest securely on flat surfaces, while the top section includes a vented cap for heat dissipation.
description: A weathered, vintage metal lantern with a cylindrical glass enclosure and protective wire guard, featuring a domed top and sturdy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass enclosure, wire guard, and the main control knob clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical support and the profile of the handle and wire guard.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the glass enclosure and wire guard, less detail on the control knob.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other vertical support and the side profile of the lantern.
